subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest Thy loved ones in the land of exile and their abasement amidst the people, though their abasement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی تری احبائک فی دیار الغربه و ذلتهم بین البریه ولو ان ذله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment
